classification_basis: Refreshed export preflight against Pizza on 2026-06-22; all 28 alert-scoped runs remained blocked with snapshotting_error_requires_review.
Pizza selected rows provide the per-run snapshotting_state, export_state, created_at, and failure_reason.
Scoped Google Cloud Logging queries confirmed representative underlying errors.

buckets.pizza_failure_reason: Snapshotting failed while running pre_snapshotting_check: BigQuery query failed because expression types were incompatible

representative.log_summary: Quervice BigQuery 400: No matching signature for operator IN UNNEST for argument types NUMERIC, ARRAY<STRING>; glerror internal_summary=BigQuery query failed because expression types were incompatible.

buckets.pizza_failure_reason: Seven Pizza rows explicitly say Quervice request timed out after 600 seconds for pre_snapshotting_check; Pizza had blank failure_reason for 12499 and 12606, but scoped logs show the same timeout/503 pattern.

representatives.log_summary: snapshotting.quervice_client_async error: Quervice request timed out after 600 seconds for report pre_snapshotting_check; subsequent retries received nginx 503 responses.
Pizza failure_reason was null, but logs show pre_snapshotting_check timeout after 600 seconds followed by repeated nginx 503 responses from Quervice.

buckets.pizza_failure_reason: Quervice request timed out after 600 seconds for report 'metadata_write_up'.
Snapshotting failed while running pre_snapshotting_check: Requested field was not found in the source schema

representative.log_summary: BigQuery 400: Name Purchase_Group_Category_SeasonalContinuityPromotion_EasterSeasonal7950_L52W not found inside Product_Attributes_Product_Group_categoryL; glerror internal_summary=Requested field was not found in the source schema.

pizza_failure_reasons: Snapshotting failed while running base_table_not_empty: unknown error
Snapshotting failed while running pre_snapshotting_check: unknown error
Snapshotting failed while running snapshot_history_write_up: unknown error
Snapshotting failed while running snapshot_history_delete_old_rows: unknown error
buckets.classification: Scoped logs classify all 8 as Quervice timeout/error-response failures hidden behind Pizza unknown-error text.

representatives.log_summary: Pizza says base_table_not_empty unknown error; scoped logs show the same run had pre_snapshotting_check timeout/503 activity before the terminal unknown state, including an unhandled Quervice API exception at 2026-06-22T04:48:43Z.
Pizza says pre_snapshotting_check unknown error; logs show repeated Quervice request timeouts after 600 seconds for pre_snapshotting_check, then terminal QuerviceClientError.
Pizza says base_table_not_empty unknown error; logs show repeated base_table_not_empty Quervice timeouts after 600 seconds and Quervice error responses.
Pizza says snapshot_history_delete_old_rows unknown error; logs show Quervice timeouts after 600 seconds for snapshot_history_delete_old_rows and terminal QuerviceClientError.
snapshotting.quervice_client_async error: Quervice request timed out after 600 seconds for report snapshot_history_write_up.
Pizza says pre_snapshotting_check unknown error; logs show repeated pre_snapshotting_check Quervice timeouts after 600 seconds and error responses.
Pizza says base_table_not_empty unknown error; logs show base_table_not_empty Quervice timeouts after 600 seconds and repeated error responses.
Pizza says pre_snapshotting_check unknown error; logs show repeated pre_snapshotting_check Quervice timeouts after 600 seconds, lock expiry warnings, and terminal QuerviceClientError.

inference: This is not one root cause. It is a PagerDuty incident-level accumulation of multiple snapshotting blockers across Albertsons LiveRamp exports. After log review, 18 of 28 alerts belong with Quervice timeout/error-response behavior, 9 with BigQuery type mismatch, and 1 with missing source schema. Several failures involve delta exports/unload_deltas, so later successful scheduled runs should not be used as sole closure evidence without applying snapshotting-delta-recovery.
